title: Bun Burger Bites
description: A simple recipe to make delicious burger bites with a bun and sesame seed topping.
instructions: Cut the burger into small bite-sized pieces.
Divide the bun into small pieces and toast them in the oven for 2-3 minutes.
Mix the sesame seeds with a pinch of salt and sprinkle over the toasted bun.
Serve the burger bites with the sesame bun on the side.
